Incident response.feedback: You've achieved a strong score of 8.7 out of 10 on this incident response quiz, indicating a solid understanding of the core concepts. Your mastery of creating an incident response plan and identifying different types of security incidents is particularly commendable. The area that would benefit from a bit more focus is understanding the specific phases within incident response frameworks. To strengthen your grasp of this, I recommend reviewing the NIST incident response lifecycle and practicing identifying which phase each hypothetical incident scenario falls into. With a little targeted review of these phases, you'll be well-equipped to tackle any incident response challenge.

Keep working at it, and you'll build the necessary knowledge in these key areas.
